name: CoWork Plugin Hub
description: A full-stack plugin development hub for Claude CoWork. Agents, subagents, skills, commands, and MCP connectors — from a shared base to domain-specific plugins.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Contract review, NDA triage, compliance, risk assessment, and legal workflow automation for law firms and in-house teams.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Code review, architecture analysis, incident response, deploy checklists, and engineering workflow automation.

plugins.name: plugin-builder
plugins.description: A meta-plugin for building other plugins. Guided workflow for creating, customizing, and validating CoWork plugins.
